backstory.original: Paultin and his 'son' Simon (AKA Murderbot) have been adventuring as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. Paultin is a wise-cracking adventurer who is more at home at a tavern than anywhere else. He cares deeply for those he considers his friends and will leap into action if anyone hurts them.
backstory.display: 保尔丁和他的“儿子”西蒙（又名杀戮机器）多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的成员进行冒险。保尔丁是一名聪明的冒险家，他在酒馆里比在其他地方更有家的感觉。他非常关心那些他认为是朋友的人，如果有人伤害他们，他会立即付诸行动。

description.original: Simon attacks with a poisoned dart. Paultin attacks too, sometimes.
description.display: 西蒙使用剧毒飞镖发动攻击。有时保尔丁也会一起攻击。

description.original: Paultin swings the Sunsword, creating a shockwave that deals massive damage to all enemies.
description.display: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，制造一道震荡波，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。

longDescription.original: Paultin swings the Sunsword, dealing massive damage to all enemies. The damage is increased by the current enemy enrage multiplier.
longDescription.display: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。伤害会根据敌人的当前怒气系数而增加。

description.desc: $source increases the party's gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion adjacent to them.
每有一位勇士与$source相邻，即提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 队伍金币获得量

tipText.original: Paultin increases your party's gold find for each Champion adjacent to him.
tipText.display: 每位与保尔丁相邻的勇士均增加队伍的金币寻获。

description.desc: Paultin increases the damage of Champions not adjacent to him by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion that IS adjacent to him.

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the Damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion adjacent to Paultin

description.desc: 每有一位勇士与保尔丁相邻，即提升不与保尔丁相邻的所有勇士 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the Damage of $target by $amount% for every Champion adjacent to Paultin

tipText.original: Paultin increases the damage of everyone not adjacent to him, based on the number of Champions that ARE adjacent to him!
tipText.display: 保尔丁使所有不与他相邻的盟友伤害提高，数值取决于与他相邻的勇士数量！

description.desc: Increase the damage of Waffle Crew members in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)% for each member of the Waffle Crew in the formation. (multiplicative, then buffed by $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%)

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)% for every $(describe_tags tag) champion in the formation (multiplicative).  Total increased by $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位华夫饼小队成员，即为所有华夫饼小队成员提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害（乘算后强化 $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%）

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 阵型中每有一名$(describe_tags tag)勇士，使$target的伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。合计提升 $(upgrade_bonus 2037)%

specializationDescription.original: Paultin relies on the luck of the fortune-telling Vistani, increasing his gold find buff.
specializationDescription.display: 保尔丁依靠维斯塔尼预言者的运气，强化他的金币寻获增益。

specializationDescription.original: Paultin tracks down more magical secrets, further increasing your party's damage.
specializationDescription.display: 保尔丁追踪到更多神奇奥秘，进一步提高队伍的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Magical Secrets by $amount% if $source is on the edge of the formation.
如果$source处于阵型边缘，则提升 $amount% 神奇奥秘的效果

description.original: If not for me, do it for poor Simon.
description.display: 如果不是为我，那么就当是为了可怜的西蒙。

description.original: We've taken down Strahd, so we can take on anything!
description.display: 我们已经击倒了斯特拉德，我们可以搞定任何事！

description.original: Yeah, I can earn a few coins here and there.
description.display: 是的，我不管到哪里都可以挣点钱。

description.original: What can I say, people just love throwing coins at me.
description.display: 我能怎么说呢，人们就是喜欢往我身上扔钱。

description.original: I live a decent life and so too do those around me.
description.display: 我过着体面的生活，我周围的人也是如此。

description.original: I'll give you a hint: it's done with magic.
description.display: 我给你个提示：这与魔法有关。

description.original: What do you mean you're out? I see plenty of wine over there!
description.display: 什么叫你喝完了？我看到那边还有很多酒！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Paultin and his 'son' Simon (AKA Murderbot) have been adventuring as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. Paultin is a wise-cracking adventurer who is more at home at a tavern than anywhere else. He cares deeply for those he considers his friends and will leap into action if anyone hurts them.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Paultin buffs your champions and increases gold find based on adjacencies. His ultimate damage scales up with the peril the party faces.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 保尔丁和他的“儿子”西蒙（又名杀戮机器）多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的成员进行冒险。保尔丁是一名聪明的冒险家，他在酒馆里比在其他地方更有家的感觉。他非常关心那些他认为是朋友的人，如果有人伤害他们，他会立即付诸行动。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 保尔丁会为你的勇士提供增益，并根据距离提高金币寻获量。他的杀招伤害会随着队伍所面临的威胁而增加。

original.description: Simon attacks with a poisoned dart. Paultin attacks too, sometimes.

display.name: 剧毒飞镖
display.description: 西蒙使用剧毒飞镖发动攻击。有时保尔丁也会一起攻击。

original.long_description: Paultin swings the Sunsword, dealing massive damage to all enemies. The damage is increased by the current enemy enrage multiplier.

display.description: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，制造一道震荡波，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。
display.long_description: 保尔丁挥舞太阳之剑，对所有敌人造成高额伤害。伤害会根据敌人的当前怒气系数而增加。

display.name: 幸运
display.tip_text: 每位与保尔丁相邻的勇士均增加队伍的金币寻获。

original.name: Magical Secrets
original.tip_text: Paultin increases the damage of everyone not adjacent to him, based on the number of Champions that ARE adjacent to him!

display.name: 神奇奥秘
display.tip_text: 保尔丁使所有不与他相邻的盟友伤害提高，数值取决于与他相邻的勇士数量！

original.specialization_description: Paultin relies on the luck of the fortune-telling Vistani, increasing his gold find buff.

display.specialization_description: 保尔丁依靠维斯塔尼预言者的运气，强化他的金币寻获增益。

original.specialization_description: Paultin tracks down more magical secrets, further increasing your party's damage.

display.specialization_description: 保尔丁追踪到更多神奇奥秘，进一步提高队伍的伤害。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: If not for me, do it for poor Simon.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 如果不是为我，那么就当是为了可怜的西蒙。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: We've taken down Strahd, so we can take on anything!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我们已经击倒了斯特拉德，我们可以搞定任何事！

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Yeah, I can earn a few coins here and there.

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 是的，我不管到哪里都可以挣点钱。

original.name: Lucky
original.description: What can I say, people just love throwing coins at me.

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 我能怎么说呢，人们就是喜欢往我身上扔钱。

original.name: Observant
original.description: What do you mean you're out? I see plenty of wine over there!

display.name: 洞察
display.description: 什么叫你喝完了？我看到那边还有很多酒！

original.name: Knowable Secrets
original.description: I'll give you a hint: it's done with magic.

display.name: 可知的秘密
display.description: 我给你个提示：这与魔法有关。

original.name: Charmed Life
original.description: I live a decent life and so too do those around me.

display.name: 荣幸一生
display.description: 我过着体面的生活，我周围的人也是如此。
